query:
SELECT mi.id, mi.name, COUNT(cg.id) as complement_groups_count 
FROM menu_items mi 
JOIN complement_groups cg ON cg.menu_item_id = mi.id 
GROUP BY mi.id, mi.name 
HAVING COUNT(cg.id) > 0 
LIMIT 10;
